testcase.name: test_pattern_a_auto_translate_always_resolves_tr_key_at_default_locale

testcase.name: test_pattern_a_re_renders_automatically_on_locale_switch_to_pseudo
testcase.error: Godot Runtime Error ! 'at: LocalizationLocaleSwitchTest.test_pattern_a_re_renders_automatically_on_locale_switch_to_pseudo (res://tests/unit/foundation/localization_locale_switch_test.gd:76)' Error: 'Invalid call. Nonexistent function 'get_translated_text' in base 'Label'.'

testcase.name: test_pattern_b_re_resolves_on_locale_switch_via_notification
testcase.failure: Pattern B: composed text must change after set_locale('_pseudo'). en_text='Objective: Reach Plaza' pseudo_text='Objective: Reach Plaza'. DIAGNOSTIC: verify the script overrides _notification(what) to handle NOTIFICATION_TRANSLATION_CHANGED.
Pattern B: pseudo label segment must appear in composed string. Got: 'Objective: Reach Plaza'
